forecast-period.text: Mostly clear. Light winds.

Partly cloudy. The chance of fog in the early morning. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 19.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers about the southern Fleurieu Peninsula, slight chance elsewhere. Winds northerly 25 to 35 km/h increasing to 25 to 40 km/h in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Cloudy. Very high chance of rain, most likely in the morning. Winds northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h turning west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 18.
Mostly sunny. Light winds becoming northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 17.
Partly cloudy. Light winds.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the evening. Light winds becoming east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then tending north to northeasterly in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers in the south, slight chance elsewhere. Winds northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h turning northerly 25 to 35 km/h early in the morning then increasing to 30 to 45 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Cloudy. Very high chance of rain, most likely in the morning. Winds north to northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h shifting southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Mostly sunny day. Slight chance of a shower in the evening. Light winds becoming easterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then tending northeasterly during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Partly cloudy. Light winds.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the evening. Light winds becoming northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Cloudy. Very high chance of rain, most likely in the evening. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending north to northwesterly 30 to 40 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h turning west to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Partly cloudy. Light winds.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds becoming northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely at night. Winds northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h turning northerly 25 to 35 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Cloudy. Very high chance of rain, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds north to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h shifting southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog near the eastern border. Light winds becoming northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Partly cloudy. Light winds.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely at night. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning northerly 25 to 35 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of rain, most likely in the morning. Winds north to northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h turning westerly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Partly cloudy. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Mostly clear. Light winds.

The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower in the early morning. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]
Partly cloudy. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Cloudy. Very high chance of rain, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h turning west to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Mostly clear. Light winds.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the southwest, most likely at night. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h increasing to 20 to 30 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Cloudy. Very high chance of rain, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds north to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h turning west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds becoming northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Clear. Light winds.

Slight chance of a shower in the early morning. The chance of morning fog in the east. Mostly sunny day. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending northwest to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then tending northeasterly in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 21.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning northerly 25 to 35 km/h early in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Cloudy. Very high chance of rain, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds north to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h tending northwest to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 14 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 19.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog in the east. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the evening. Winds easterly 15 to 20 km/h turning northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 19.
Clear. Light winds.
Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Hawker. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 23.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Mostly sunny. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning northerly 25 to 35 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 14 with daytime temperatures reaching 20 to 25.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds north to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h tending west to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 20.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the evening. Winds southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning east to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 21.
Clear. Light winds.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers west of Nullarbor, medium chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm west of Nullarbor in the late afternoon and evening. Winds northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Sun protection 12:20pm to 1:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Cloudy. Very high chance of rain west of Ceduna, high chance elsewhere. Winds northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h turning north to northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h during the morning and early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid 20s.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds northwest to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending southerly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the evening. The chance of a thunderstorm in the evening. Winds easterly 15 to 20 km/h turning northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Clear. Light winds.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower in the late afternoon and evening. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers in the south, slight chance elsewhere. Winds northerly 25 to 40 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Cloudy. Very high chance of rain, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds north to northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h shifting south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then tending south to southeasterly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 19.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the evening. Light winds becoming easterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then tending northeasterly during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Mostly clear. Light winds.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the late afternoon and evening. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Cloudy. High chance of rain, most likely in the evening. Winds north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h tending north to northwesterly 30 to 45 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds northwest to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h tending south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Mostly sunny morning. Slight chance of a shower in the evening. Light winds becoming northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Mostly clear. Light winds.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the far west, most likely in the morning. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm in the far west in the late afternoon and evening. Winds north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching 23 to 29.
Sun protection 11:00am to 2:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers in the far west, most likely in the evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds northerly 25 to 40 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 13 and 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers south of Coober Pedy, medium chance elsewhere. Winds northwest to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h tending southeast to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 25.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. The chance of a thunderstorm south of Coober Pedy in the evening. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Clear. Light winds.

Sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Yunta. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then tending east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching 22 to 29.
Sun protection 11:10am to 1:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Sunny. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h in the morning then tending east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching 23 to 28.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers south of Leigh Creek, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h tending north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the day then tending northeast to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 14 with daytime temperatures reaching 20 to 29.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog south of Yunta. Medium chance of showers south of Leigh Creek, most likely in the morning. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds northeast to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 27.
